columns.name: STVHLDD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the hold type code referenced in the Academic History Module and cross-referenced by the Hold Form (SOAHOLD) and Hold Query-Only Form (SOQHOLD).

columns.name: STVHLDD_REG_HOLD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the hold type prevents registration.

columns.name: STVHLDD_TRANS_HOLD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the hold type prevents transcript generation.

columns.name: STVHLDD_GRAD_HOLD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the hold type prevents graduation.

columns.name: STVHLDD_GRADE_HOLD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the hold type prevents grade report generation.

columns.name: STVHLDD_DESC
columns.description: This field specifies the hold type (e.g. registrars hold, library fine, financial hold, etc.) associated with the hold type code.

columns.name: STVHLDD_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most recent date a record was created or updated.

columns.name: STVHLDD_VR_MSG_NO
columns.description: The Voice Response message number assigned to the recorded message that describes the hold type code.

columns.name: STVHLDD_APPLICATION_HOLD_IND
columns.description: Indicates application hold which will prevent creation of application.

columns.name: STVHLDD_COMPLIANCE_HOLD_IND
columns.description: This field indicates whether the hold type prevents compliance.

columns.name: STVHLDD_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: STVHLDD_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA ORIGIN: Source system that created or updated the data.
